subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-29 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The origin of this was from Islam, where it was known as a house of healing. The Europeans came hither, and Louis the Seventh established it in France [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مبدأ این از اسلام است، شفاخانه می گفتند.  حضرات اروپائیها آمدند اینجا، لویز سابع  رفت در فرانسه تأسیس نمود
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
